title: USAF's Autonomous AI fighter drone just fired a 'real' AMRAAM air-to-air missile in a world first
summary: The US Air Force has successfully tested a Collaborative Combat Aircraft firing a live AIM-120 AMRAAM missile, marking a major step for autonomous combat systems. Air Force officials have not disclosed total program costs or production numbers for the first manufacturing phase.
caption: output/2026-07-18/usaf-s-autonomous-ai-fighter-drone-just-fired-a-real-amraam-air-to-air.txt
